scripts.build: pnpm build-deps && node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.build-deps: pnpm --filter @massion/application build && pnpm --filter @massion/assurance build && pnpm --filter @massion/context-strategy build && pnpm --filter @massion/evidence build && pnpm --filter @massion/extension-host build && pnpm --filter @massion/records build && pnpm --filter @massion/registry build && pnpm --filter @massion/router exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/runtime exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/software-engineering exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/subscriptions build
